swills      2011-06-18 18:29:09 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    databases            Makefile 
  Added files:
    databases/rubygem-dm-observer Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  DataMapper::Observer allows you to add callback hooks to
  many models. This is similar to observers in ActiveRecord.
  
  WWW: https://github.com/datamapper/dm-observer
  
  PR:             ports/157985
  Submitted by:   Ryan Steinmetz <rpsfa at rit.edu>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
